description: A template showing all available spawn.json fields. Copy this folder, rename it to your space ID, fill in the fields, and push — the GitHub Action will wire everything up automatically.
context: This space is focused on [describe what you're building or working on here]. It coordinates with studio-os-chat for UI tasks and studio-os for orchestration.
systemPromptExtra: Always reply in structured markdown. When sending a message to another space, use the envelope format defined in the studio-os-spaces README.
